channel.title: Microverse
channel.description: System monitoring for macOS with elegant desktop widgets

item.title: Microverse 0.4.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.4.0

  • 🔒 Working Auto-Update System: Secure EdDSA-signed updates with Sparkle framework
  • ⚡ Performance Optimized: Enhanced system monitoring with minimal resource usage
  • 🎨 Polished UI: Refined desktop widgets and elegant tabbed interface
  • 🛠️ Stability Improvements: Robust error handling and memory management

System Requirements

macOS 11.0 or later

This release introduces a fully functional auto-update system with cryptographic verification for secure, seamless updates.
